scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @codex-search/server" "npm run dev -w @codex-search/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @codex-search/core && npm run build -w @codex-search/server && npm run build -w @codex-search/web
scripts.build:publish: npm run build -w @codex-search/core && npm run build -w @codex-search/web && mkdir -p packages/cli/public && cp -r packages/web/dist/* packages/cli/public/ && npm run build -w @codex-search/cli
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run build -w @codex-search/desktop
scripts.desktop: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist -w @codex-search/desktop
scripts.desktop:mac: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist:mac -w @codex-search/desktop
scripts.desktop:win: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist:win -w @codex-search/desktop
scripts.desktop:linux: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist:linux -w @codex-search/desktop
